title: RBAC Role Assignment
description: An association between a principal (user, group, or service account) and a role within a Role-Based Access Control system.

principalId.description: Identifier of the user, group, or service account being assigned the role.

roleId.description: Identifier of the role being assigned.

scope.description: Scope of the assignment (e.g., global, organization, project, resource).

grantedBy.description: Identifier of the principal that granted this assignment.

expiresAt.description: Optional expiration timestamp for time-limited assignments.
